title: Create a Study Schedule
description: Allocate specific hours each week for learning and stick to your routine.

title: Use the Pomodoro Technique
description: Study for 25 minutes, take a 5-minute break, and repeat to stay productive.

title: Avoid Distractions
description: Turn off notifications and create a focused study environment.

title: Prioritize Important Tasks
description: Complete challenging lessons first when your energy and focus are highest.
